diagrams.title: Threaded Binary Tree Node Structure
diagrams.description: Shows the 5-field node structure used in doubly-threaded binary trees with flags
diagrams.purpose: Clarifies how flags distinguish between child pointers and thread links, fundamental to understanding threaded tree representation

diagrams.title: Inorder Thread Connections Example
diagrams.description: A sample tree with 5 nodes showing how threads connect inorder predecessor and successor
elements: Root with value 20, left child 10, right child 30
NULL pointers replaced with thread arrows pointing to inorder neighbors
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes how threads replace NULL pointers to enable efficient inorder traversal without stack or recursion

diagrams.title: Thread Flags Interpretation Guide
diagrams.description: Decision diagram showing how to interpret lthread and rthread flags
elements: lthread=0: left pointer is LEFT CHILD
lthread=1: left pointer is PREDECESSOR thread
rthread=0: right pointer is RIGHT CHILD
rthread=1: right pointer is SUCCESSOR thread
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for reading threaded binary tree nodes correctly during traversal or debugging
